'''''Valkyrie'' 19''' was a roleplaying magazine from Spring of [[2000]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including the first of a two-part adventure written by [[Phil Sidebotham]] for the [[West End Games]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|''Star Wars'' D6 system]]. The adventure was called "[[Flight of the Jedi]]." Part two of the series continued in ''[[Valkyrie 20]]''.
